auth.login_tip: Enter your email below to login to your account.

archive.title: Archive
archive.subject: Subject
archive.delete_confirmation_title: Are you sure you want to delete this email?
archive.delete_confirmation_description: This action cannot be undone and will permanently remove the email and its attachments.
archive.integrity_report_download_error: Failed to generate the integrity report.
archive.integrity_check_failed_message: Could not verify the integrity of the email and its attachments.
archive.integrity_report_description: This report verifies that the content of your archived emails has not been altered.
archive.retention_policy_description: Shows which retention policy governs this email and when it is scheduled for deletion.
archive.retention_no_policy: No policy applies — this email will not be automatically deleted.
archive.retention_policy_overridden_by_label: This policy is overridden by retention label

ingestions.title: Ingestion Sources
ingestions.name: Name
ingestions.edit_description: Make changes to your ingestion source here.
ingestions.create_description: Add a new ingestion source to start archiving emails.
ingestions.delete_confirmation_title: Are you sure you want to delete this ingestion?
ingestions.delete_confirmation_description: This will delete all archived emails, attachments, indexing, and files associated with this ingestion. If you only want to stop syncing new emails, you can pause the ingestion instead.
ingestions.bulk_delete_confirmation_title: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} selected ingestions?
ingestions.bulk_delete_confirmation_description: This will delete all archived emails, attachments, indexing, and files associated with these ingestions. If you only want to stop syncing new emails, you can pause the ingestions instead.
ingestions.gmail_auth_success_message: Your Gmail account has been successfully connected. Email archiving will begin shortly.
ingestions.gmail_auth_error_message: Failed to connect your Gmail account. Please try again.

search.title: Search
search.no_results_description: Try adjusting your search terms or filters
search.help_tip_quotes: Use quotes for exact phrases: "meeting notes"
search.help_tip_filters: Use filters to narrow by sender, recipient, or date
search.help_tip_strategy: Fuzzy matches similar words, Verbatim requires exact match

roles.title: Role Management
roles.name: Name
roles.edit_description: Make changes to the role here.
roles.create_description: Add a new role to the system.
roles.delete_confirmation_title: Are you sure you want to delete this role?
roles.delete_confirmation_description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the role.

account.title: Account Settings
account.description: Manage your profile and security settings.
account.security_desc: Manage your password and security preferences.
account.edit_profile_desc: Make changes to your profile here.
account.change_password_desc: Change your password. You will need to enter your current password.

system_settings.title: System Settings
system_settings.search_max_results_description: Maximum number of search results that can be paginated through. Higher values use more memory.
system_settings.default_excluded_tags_description: Tags to exclude from search results by default (e.g., SPAM, TRASH).
system_settings.no_tags_available: No tags available. Tags will appear once emails are archived.

users.title: User Management
users.name: Name
users.edit_description: Make changes to the user here.
users.create_description: Add a new user to the system.
users.delete_confirmation_title: Are you sure you want to delete this user?
users.delete_confirmation_description: This action cannot be undone. This will permanently delete the user and remove their data from our servers.

email_preview.not_available: Raw .eml file not available for this email.

ingestion_source_form.gmail_oauth_description: After submitting, you will be redirected to Google to authorize access to your Gmail account. This allows Open Archiver to read your emails for archiving.
ingestion_source_form.service_account_key_placeholder: Paste your service account key JSON content
ingestion_source_form.client_secret_placeholder: Enter the secret Value, not the Secret ID
ingestion_source_form.org_wide_warning: Please note that this is an organization-wide operation. This kind of ingestions will import and index all email inboxes in your organization. If you want to import only specific email inboxes, use the IMAP connector.
ingestion_source_form.upload_network_error: The server could not process the upload. The file may exceed the configured upload size limit (BODY_SIZE_LIMIT). For very large files, use the Local Path option instead.
ingestion_source_form.jmap_info_description: JMAP is a modern email protocol supported by providers like Fastmail, Stalwart, and Cyrus IMAP. For Fastmail, use the session URL https://api.fastmail.com/jmap/session with a bearer token from your account settings.

setup.title: Setup
setup.description: Set up the initial administrator account for Open Archiver.
setup.create_admin_account: Create the first administrator account to get started.

api_keys_page.title: API Keys
api_keys_page.name: Name
api_keys_page.generate_modal_description: Please provide a name and expiration for your new API key.
api_keys_page.generated_message: Your API key is generated, please copy and save it in a secure place. This key will only be shown once.

dashboard_page.title: Dashboard
dashboard_page.no_ingestion_header: You don't have any ingestion source set up.
dashboard_page.no_ingestion_text: Add an ingestion source to start archiving your inboxes.

retention_policies.title: Retention Policies
retention_policies.meta_description: Manage data retention policies to automate email lifecycle and compliance.
retention_policies.name: Name
retention_policies.conditions_description: Define rules to match emails. If no conditions are set, the policy applies to all emails.
retention_policies.create_description: Create a new retention policy to manage the lifecycle of archived emails.
retention_policies.edit_description: Update the settings for this retention policy.
retention_policies.delete_confirmation_description: This action cannot be undone. Emails matched by this policy will no longer be subject to automatic deletion.
retention_policies.simulator_description: Test an email's metadata against all active policies to see which retention period would apply.
retention_policies.simulator_no_match: No active policy matched this email. It will not be subject to automated deletion.
retention_policies.simulator_matched: Matched — retention period of {{days}} days applies.
retention_policies.simulator_no_result: Run a simulation to see which policies apply to a given email.
retention_policies.simulator_ingestion_source_description: Select an ingestion source to test scoped policies. Leave blank to evaluate against all policies regardless of scope.
retention_policies.ingestion_scope_description: Restrict this policy to specific ingestion sources. Leave all unchecked to apply to all sources.
retention_policies.ingestion_scope_selected: {{count}} source(s) selected — this policy will only apply to emails from those sources.

retention_labels.title: Retention Labels
retention_labels.meta_description: Manage retention labels for item-level compliance overrides on individual archived emails.
retention_labels.name: Name
retention_labels.create_description: Create a new retention label. Once applied to emails, the label's retention period cannot be changed.
retention_labels.delete_confirmation_description: This action will permanently remove the label. It cannot be applied to new emails.
retention_labels.disable_confirmation_description: This label is currently applied to archived emails and cannot be deleted. It will be disabled so it cannot be applied to new emails, but existing tagged emails will keep this label although it won't take effective.
retention_labels.force_delete_confirmation_description: This label is disabled but still has email associations. Deleting it will remove all those associations and permanently delete the label. This action cannot be undone.
retention_labels.retention_period_locked: Retention period cannot be changed while the label is applied to emails.
retention_labels.description_placeholder: e.g. Applied to tax-related documents requiring extended retention.

archive_labels.section_description: Override this email's retention schedule with a specific label.
archive_labels.label_overrides_policy: This label overrides general retention policies for this email.
archive_labels.no_labels_available: No retention labels available. Create labels in Compliance settings.
archive_labels.label_inactive_note: This label has been disabled. It no longer provides a retention override or a scheduled deletion date for this email. You may remove it and apply an active label if needed.

legal_holds.title: Legal Holds
legal_holds.meta_description: Manage legal holds to preserve emails from automated deletion during litigation or regulatory investigations.
legal_holds.header_description: Legal holds suspend automated deletion for specific records relevant to litigation or regulatory investigations.
legal_holds.name: Name
legal_holds.reason_placeholder: e.g. Pending litigation related to Project Titan. All communications must be preserved.
legal_holds.create_description: Create a new legal hold to prevent automated deletion of relevant emails.
legal_holds.edit_description: Update this legal hold's name or description.
legal_holds.delete_confirmation_description: This will permanently delete the hold and remove all email associations. Previously protected emails will be subject to normal retention rules at the next lifecycle worker run.
legal_holds.bulk_apply_title: Bulk Apply Legal Hold via Search
legal_holds.bulk_apply_description: Search for emails using full-text and metadata filters. All matching emails will be placed under this legal hold. The exact query is saved to the audit log as proof of scope.
legal_holds.bulk_query_hint: Searches email body, subject, and attachment content via the full-text index.
legal_holds.bulk_apply_warning: This action will apply to ALL emails matching your search across the entire archive. The search query will be permanently recorded in the audit log.
legal_holds.release_all_title: Release all emails from this hold?
legal_holds.release_all_description: All emails will lose their legal hold immunity. They will be evaluated against standard retention policies at the next lifecycle worker run and may be permanently deleted.
legal_holds.activated_success: Legal hold activated. Protected emails are now immune from deletion.
legal_holds.deactivated_success: Legal hold deactivated. Emails are no longer protected by this hold.
legal_holds.release_all_error: Failed to release emails from hold.

archive_legal_holds.section_description: Suspend automated deletion for this email by placing it under a legal hold.
archive_legal_holds.no_holds: No legal holds applied to this email.
archive_legal_holds.apply_success: Legal hold applied to this email.
archive_legal_holds.remove_success: Legal hold removed from this email.
archive_legal_holds.immune_notice: This email is protected by an active legal hold and cannot be deleted.
archive_legal_holds.no_active_holds: No active legal holds available. Create holds in Compliance settings.

audit_log.title: Audit Log
audit_log.viewing_details_for: Viewing the complete details for log entry #
audit_log.verification_failed_message: The audit log integrity check failed. Please review the system logs for more details.
audit_log.verification_error_message: An unexpected error occurred during verification. Please try again.

license_page.title: Enterprise License Status
license_page.meta_description: View the current status of your Open Archiver Enterprise license.
license_page.revoked_message: Your license has been revoked or your seat overage grace period has expired. All enterprise features are now disabled. Please contact your account manager for assistance.
license_page.seat_limit_exceeded_message: Your license covers {{planSeats}} seats but {{activeSeats}} are currently in use. Please reduce usage or upgrade your plan.
license_page.seat_limit_grace_deadline: Enterprise features will be disabled on {{date}} unless the seat count is reduced.
license_page.enabled_features_description: The following enterprise features are currently enabled.
